title: Bani's Enhanced Survival
description: This modpack enhances Minecraft with 100+ mods by adding new features, changing existing features like revamped dimensions, vanilla-like mobs and structures, all optimized for better performance and immersive gameplay.
body:
![the logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4bebed32098c253e5243a693c0f3c4bc3573ccc.png)
# WELCOME TO BANI'S ENHANCED SURVIVAL MODPACK PAGE!
Twitter (soon) | [Discord](https://discord.gg/AcQZgTvUzT) | Youtube (soon) | TikTok (soon)

- ✔️**100+ lightweight mods!** - Packed with features to expand and improve the Minecraft experience while everything being vanilla!(Mostly QoL mods, APIs and libraries)
 
- ✔️**Revamped world generation** - Explore an enhanced overworld with brand-new biomes and custom landscapes, giving the world a fresh, immersive feel.

- ✔️**Mobs from Mob Votes** - Ever wanted to interact with the coolest mobs from Minecraft’s Mob Votes? Now you can! Encounter and tame these creatures in your world.
 
- ✔️**Revamped Nether and End** - Prepare to be amazed by a completely overhauled Nether and End dimension. More dangerous, more rewarding!
 
- ✔️**New way to access the End** - Getting to the End is no longer just about finding a fortress. Uncover new mechanics and explore deeper to reach the End portal.
 
- ✔️**500+ new structures** - Discover endless possibilities with custom structures, ranging from massive dungeons to hidden temples, scattered throughout the world!
 
- ✔️**Optimized for high performance**, including support for shader packs to make the game look stunning without slowing down your PC.
 
- ✔️**Tons of new mobs, bosses, and creatures** - The world is alive with new challenges and adventures, from small creatures to massive world-ending bosses.
 
- ✔️**Revamped existing structures** - Villages, temples, and fortresses are bigger, better, and more exciting to explore than ever before.
 
- ✔️**Countless quality of life improvements for a more enjoyable survival experience, including performance tweaks, bug fixes, and gameplay adjustments.**

- ✔️**Huge amount of furniture and decorative blocks for your builds!**
 
- ✔️**Endless opportunities for creative building, exploration, and survival. Build, battle, and explore with tons of decorations, advanced machinery, and much more.**
 
- ✔️**Highly customizable modpack with updates planned and in development to keep the experience fresh!**
 
## [SEE MODPACK GALLERY!](https://imgur.com/a/xL2uqja)

## ABOUT THE MODPACK:
**Bani's Enhanced Survival** is an adventure-focused modpack that brings Minecraft to life in ways you’ve never experienced before. From improved world generation to revamped dimensions, this modpack is crafted for explorers, builders, and survivors. It features 100+ mods that deliver an entirely new game experience, where you can explore over 500+ structures, face unique mobs like those from the Mob Votes, and dive into the dangerous depths of the revamped Nether and End.

Enjoy better performance with custom optimizations and bug fixes, plus support for shader packs for a visual overhaul that doesn’t hurt performance. This pack is perfect for those looking to push their survival and creativity to new heights!

## KINETIC HOSTING:

## FOR CONTENT CREATORS:
If you’re a **content creator,** Bani's Enhanced Survival is the perfect modpack to engage your audience with something new and exciting. With a world full of unique structures, new mobs, and revamped game mechanics, you’ll have endless opportunities for exciting adventures and builds. From exploration to building, every session will bring fresh discoveries to keep your viewers hooked!

## SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
### CLIENT:
- **MINIMAL:** 6 GB of ram
- **RECOMMENDED:** 6 GB of ram
- **BEST:** 8+ GB of ram

### SERVER:
**[Depends on amount of players]**

- **MINIMAL:** 6-10 GB of ram
- **RECOMMENDED:** 12 GB of ram
- **BEST:** 16+ GB of ram

## EXTRA NOTES:
This modpack is my second project, and I’m constantly updating it to improve performance, add new content, and refine the gameplay. If you encounter bugs, have suggestions, or just want to hang out, feel free to join [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/AcQZgTvUzT). I’d love to hear your feedback and make Bani's Enhanced Survival even better!

## CREDITS:
Special thanks to the talented modders and creators of the amazing mods, shaders, and resource packs included in this pack. Their work has made this possible!
